textPlain:
A sad indictment of modern times:1. Invited to play physical game with friends 
2. Only wanted to play a specific game which had no takers
3. Decided to play by self
4. Found that laborious
5. Automated humans out of the equation entirely
6. ???
I think Hungry Hungry Hippos was the board game that taught me that advertisements lie. They were not, in fact, "fun fun fun by the ton ton ton." https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lBYcWhQae98
Hug of death? If you need assistance, email on my profile.
Looks great!  Now add AI and you’ll be page 1 of HN!!

This comment is a sad indictment of modern times. Nobody can be facetious on the web any more without someone taking the joke seriously.To me, it seems like it actually was:1. Had a Hungry Hungry Hippos game2. Thought it would be a fun project to automate3. Wrote a funny setup for the post4.???
